title: Shields+
description: adds 3 new tiers of shields with varying durability
body:
a very lazy pack so me and my friends could counter glurp. cus he can be blocked by shields but drains durability very fast.

shields: (durability)

copper - 300

diamond - 700

netherite - 1400


crafted by replacing iron ingot with copper ingot, diamond, or netherite ingot


glurp.:
